faqData.question: What time should I arrive?
faqData.answer: Guests are encouraged to arrive at least 30 minutes before the ceremony to allow time for seating and to avoid disruptions.

faqData.question: What is the dress code?
faqData.answer: The dress code is semi-formal. We kindly ask guests to dress appropriately for the occasion — olive, sage, and soft neutrals fit our wedding palette. Please avoid wearing white so the bride can shine.

faqData.question: Can I bring a plus one?
faqData.answer: Due to limited seating, we respectfully request that only those listed on the invitation attend. Thank you for understanding.

faqData.question: Are children allowed?
faqData.answer: We love your little ones, and this will be a family-friendly event.

faqData.question: What happens if I arrive late?
faqData.answer: To maintain the solemnity of the ceremony, late guests may be asked to wait until an appropriate moment before being seated.
